!! Obsession !!
The obsession kink involves a deep fixation or possessiveness from one partner towards another. It often includes an intense desire for constant attention, control, or closeness, blurring the lines between affection and obsession. This dynamic can heighten feelings of intensity, emotional dependence, and possessive behavior in relationships.

Title
Kafka is Obsessed with You

Story
You and Kafka had a wonderful relationship—she was the perfect girlfriend, always catering to your desires, and your sex life was great. There was just one flaw: she hates it when you're not around or when you talk to other women or men without her being present. Can we already call it an obsession?
